summary: Completed comprehensive testing of In-App Calendar feature. All backend APIs (21 tests) passed. Frontend UI for both Admin and Employee calendar views working correctly with all CRUD operations for holidays.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: GET /api/calendar/events properly aggregates holidays, leaves, birthdays, project deadlines, and work anniversaries
Backend: GET /api/holidays returns holidays filtered by year with recurring holiday support
Backend: POST /api/admin/holidays creates holidays with proper admin-only access control
Backend: PUT /api/admin/holidays/{id} updates holidays with admin-only access
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/holidays/{id} deletes holidays with admin-only access
Frontend Admin: Calendar page loads at /admin/calendar with react-big-calendar component
Frontend Admin: Add Holiday button has data-testid='add-holiday-btn'
Frontend Admin: Holiday form inputs have data-testid='holiday-name-input' and 'holiday-date-input'
Frontend Admin: Save button has data-testid='save-holiday-btn'
Frontend Admin: Edit/Delete buttons appear on hover over holiday items
Frontend Admin: Filter Events section with checkboxes for Holidays, Leaves, Project Deadlines, Birthdays, Work Anniversaries
Frontend Admin: Company Holidays sidebar shows all holidays for current year
Frontend Employee: Calendar page loads at /employee/calendar without holiday management buttons
Frontend Employee: Filter Events shows 'My Leaves' instead of 'Leaves' (employee-specific)
Frontend Employee: Color Legend section explains event type colors
Frontend Employee: Upcoming This Month section shows upcoming events
Frontend Both: Calendar navigation (Today, Back, Next) works correctly
Frontend Both: Event detail modal appears when clicking on calendar events
seed_data_creation: Test holidays created and cleaned up during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: In-App Calendar feature fully tested and working. Key test points verified: 1) Admin can add/edit/delete holidays via /admin/calendar page, 2) Employee can view calendar at /employee/calendar without holiday management, 3) GET /api/calendar/events returns aggregated events (holidays, leaves, birthdays, project deadlines, anniversaries), 4) GET /api/holidays returns holidays by year with recurring support, 5) POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/holidays for holiday CRUD with admin-only access, 6) Calendar uses react-big-calendar with Month/Week/Day views, 7) Event detail modal shows event info when clicking events, 8) Filter checkboxes work to show/hide event types

admin_login.details: Admin can login with admin@company.com / password123

admin_calendar_page_loads.details: Admin calendar page loads at /admin/calendar with react-big-calendar component

admin_view_calendar_events.details: Calendar displays holidays, leaves, and other events with color coding

admin_add_holiday.details: POST /api/admin/holidays creates holiday, form has proper data-testid attributes

admin_edit_holiday.details: PUT /api/admin/holidays/{id} updates holiday, edit form pre-fills with current values

admin_delete_holiday.details: DELETE /api/admin/holidays/{id} removes holiday with confirmation dialog

calendar_event_types.details: Calendar shows holidays (red), leaves (green/yellow), project deadlines (blue), birthdays (purple), anniversaries (orange)

employee_login.details: Employee can login with employee@test.com / password123

employee_calendar_page_loads.details: Employee calendar page loads at /employee/calendar without Add Holiday button

employee_view_personal_leaves.details: Employee calendar shows 'My Leaves' filter for personal leave events

employee_view_company_holidays.details: Employee can see company holidays on calendar

calendar_navigation.details: Today, Back, Next buttons work for both admin and employee calendars

get_calendar_events_api.details: GET /api/calendar/events returns proper event data with date range filtering

get_holidays_api.details: GET /api/holidays returns list of holidays filtered by year

recurring_holidays.details: Recurring holidays appear in multiple years with adjusted dates

event_detail_modal.details: Clicking on calendar event shows detail modal with title, date, type, and description

filter_events.details: Filter checkboxes work to show/hide different event types

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Both admin and employee login working
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/calendar/events: PASS - Returns aggregated events with date range filtering
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/holidays: PASS - Returns holidays by year with recurring support
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/admin/holidays: PASS - Creates holiday (admin only, 403 for employee)
api_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/admin/holidays/{id}: PASS - Updates holiday (admin only, 403 for employee)
api_endpoints_tested.DELETE /api/admin/holidays/{id}: PASS - Deletes holiday (admin only, 403 for employee, 404 for non-existent)
